title: Anthropic Pricing Impact Thesis — Full Brain Analysis
description: Generate a full thesis-level HTML report analyzing the impact of Anthropic's new pricing structure (June 15 change: $200/mo credit for Agent SDK / claude -p, separate from subscription limits) on the entire Brain architecture. Must cover: all engines, all rules, all hooks, all processes, all prompts. Include token usage analysis comparing current vs new pricing. Output as HTML in Khaaan/Brain/docs/ style. Key question: can the brain's always-on daemon survive under the $200 credit cap?
